---
title: "Tools & Software"
description: "Open-source tools for mass spectrometry-based proteomics, developed by the CompOmics group at VIB-UGent."
---

All tools are freely available under permissive licences. Source code is on [GitHub](https://github.com/compomics).

## Prediction

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-clock-history tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">DeepLC</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">Predicts when peptides will elute from the LC column during a mass spectrometry run. Unlike other tools, it handles modified peptides accurately, even modifications it has never seen before. When applied to a new instrument or experimental setup, it adapts quickly through transfer learning, requiring only a small number of example peptides rather than a full retraining.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/DeepLC" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://compomics.github.io/DeepLC" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Docs</a>
      <a href="https://pypi.org/project/deeplc/" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI</a>
      <a href="https://bioconda.github.io/recipes/deeplc/README.html" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i> Bioconda</a>
      <a href="https://iomics.ugent.be/deeplc/" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i> Web app</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-021-01301-5" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper 2021</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-68981-5" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper 2026</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/robbin.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/robbin.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Robbin Bouwmeester</a>
    <a href="../team/ralf.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/ralf.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Ralf Gabriels</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-bar-chart-fill tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">MS&#178;PIP</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">Predicts fragment ion peak intensities from peptide sequence alone. These predictions are used to build in silico spectral libraries and to power the MS&#178;Rescore rescoring pipeline. Fine-tuning for user-defined modifications is possible through MS&#178;DIP.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/ms2pip" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://iomics.ugent.be/ms2pip/" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i> Web app</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btt355" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/arthur.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/arthur.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Arthur Declercq</a>
    <a href="../team/ralf.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/ralf.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Ralf Gabriels</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-layers tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">IM2Deep</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">Predicts collisional cross-section (CCS) values for peptides including multiply modified ones. Supports ion mobility filtering in DDA and DIA workflows.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/im2deep" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.4c00098" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/arthur.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/arthur.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Arthur Declercq</a>
    <a href="../team/robbin.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/robbin.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Robbin Bouwmeester</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Rescoring

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">MS&#178;Rescore</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">Rescores peptide-spectrum matches by combining predicted LC-MS/MS features (retention time, fragment intensities, and ion mobility) with observed features. Substantially increases the number of confident identifications compared to search engine scores alone. Works with DDA and DIA data, and has been validated for immunopeptidomics and metaproteomics.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/ms2rescore" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://ms2rescore.readthedocs.io" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Docs</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.mcpro.2022.100266" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/ralf.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/ralf.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Ralf Gabriels</a>
    <a href="../team/arthur.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/arthur.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Arthur Declercq</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Data Standards & Utilities

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-code-slash tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">psm_utils</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">A Python library for parsing, converting, and handling peptide-spectrum matches from any major search engine. Provides a unified PSM object model and format-agnostic I/O for building analysis pipelines.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/psm_utils" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://psm-utils.readthedocs.io" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Docs</a>
      <a href="https://pypi.org/project/psm-utils/" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/ralf.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/ralf.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Ralf Gabriels</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-table tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">lesSDRF</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">An interactive desktop app for annotating proteomics experiments in the SDRF format. Guides users through ontology-compliant metadata entry. HAMLET extends this with LLM-based pre-filling from manuscript text.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/lesSDRF" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://lessdrf.streamlit.app/" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i> Web app</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.2c00120" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/sander.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/sander.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Sander Van Puyvelde</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-binary tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">Thermo Raw File Parser</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">Converts Thermo .raw files to open formats (mzML, MGF, or Parquet) on Windows, macOS, and Linux. Widely used as a preprocessing step in proteomics pipelines.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/ThermoRawFileParser" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.9b00328" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/robbin.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/robbin.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Robbin Bouwmeester</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Taxonomy & Metaproteomics

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-diagram-3 tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">Unipept</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">Tryptic peptide-based functional and taxonomic analysis of metaproteome samples. Exposes a public API handling millions of queries per month and integrates with major proteomics workflows via a Python and R client.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/unipept/unipept" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://unipept.ugent.be/" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i> Web app</a>
      <a href="https://unipept.ugent.be/apidocs" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i> API docs</a>
      <a href="https://doi.org/10.1021/pr300576s" class="tool-link-btn tool-link-paper"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> Paper</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/robbin.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/robbin.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Robbin Bouwmeester</a>
    <a href="../team/arthur.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/arthur.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Arthur Declercq</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="tool-card">
  <div class="tool-body">
    <div class="tool-header">
      <i class="bi bi-percent tool-icon"></i>
      <span class="tool-name">Peptonizer2000</span>
    </div>
    <p class="tool-desc">Provides probabilistic taxon confidence scores for metaproteomics using a Bayesian network approach. Propagates peptide-level evidence into organism-level posteriors, giving statistically grounded taxon assignments in complex microbial community samples.</p>
    <div class="tool-links">
      <a href="https://github.com/compomics/Peptonizer2000" class="tool-link-btn"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tool-devs">
    <div class="tool-devs-title">CompOmics Developers</div>
    <a href="../team/robbin.html" class="dev-link"><img src="../assets/images/robbin.jpg" class="dev-avatar" onerror="this.style.display='none'"> Robbin Bouwmeester</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
